name: Stage 1 — Harbor District
_notes: Wave times anchor to CAMMOV combat nodes (camera dwell points found in camera.bin speed profile via tools/extract-stage-assets/analyze-path.mjs): A@~4s harbor opening, B@~74s mid stop (368,-165), C@~173s final stop (-363,-886). Positions are camera-relative offsets (x=right, -z=ahead) resolved + ground-raycast at spawn. clearPoints gate camera advance until each node is cleared (original 'clear to proceed'). Transit-segment pop-up waves between nodes are a follow-up (needs passed-enemy despawn first). Path cuts/loops at ~196s, so duration ends the round before that discontinuity.
